title: Local Proxy Search (Basic + Advanced)

content.hypothesis: Local statistics (activation fraction, response entropy, neighbor correlation) correlate with MI and can drive beta/gamma adaptation
content.method: Tested 7 proxies: 4 basic (activation_fraction, response_entropy, neighbor_correlation, response_variance), 3 advanced (mismatch_max/p95/std, RDH_variance). Computed correlation with true MI across grid
content.result: Best proxy: neighbor_correlation r=0.44. None exceeded r>0.7 threshold. Advanced proxies performed WORSE (near-zero correlation)
content.root_cause: Beta/gamma are global coupling parameters. Local statistics cannot capture global information flow. No local decomposition exists

constraints_implied: No local proxy for beta/gamma exists (7 tested, best r=0.44, none >0.7)
